name: Ring-o-Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease and lightly flour a 10-inch tube or Bundt pan.
2. Prepare the filling by setting it aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, oil, and eggs; beat for 1 minute at high speed.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (except filling and nuts) to the bowl; beat for 3 minutes at medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts by hand.
6. Pour half of the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Carefully top with the filling.
8. Cover with the remaining batter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 70-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. If the cake starts to brown too quickly, cover it loosely with foil.
10. Cool the cake upright in the pan for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool completely.
11. If desired, drizzle with glaze.
FILLING:
In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and egg until smooth. Stir in coconut and chocolate pieces.
